login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
login.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your information below to create your account
signup.usernameHint: Must be at least 3 characters long.
signup.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters long.
signup.captchaDisabled: Captcha key is empty. Captcha is currently disabled.
signup.errorUsernameShort: Username must be at least 3 characters long
signup.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
signup.errorCaptcha: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
signup.successDescription: Your account has been created. Save the security key below — you will need it to reset your password.
signup.securityKeyWarning: This key will not be shown again. Store it somewhere safe.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.description: Enter your email and security key to set a new password.
reset.emailHint: The email address associated with your account.
reset.securityKeyHint: The key you received when you registered.
reset.successSubtitle: Your password has been updated successfully.
reset.successDescription: Your password has been changed. Save the new security key below.
reset.newKeyWarning: This key will not be shown again. Store it somewhere safe — you will need it to reset your password in the future.
reset.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
